name: Geologix Explorations Inc.
description: Geologix Explorations Inc. is a Canada-based mineral exploration company focused on acquiring, exploring, and developing mineral resource properties. The company's primary exploration activities have historically been centered on gold and copper projects, notably the Tepal Gold-Copper Project in Michoacán State, Mexico. Geologix aims to create shareholder value through the strategic acquisition and advancement of highly prospective mineral properties in North America.
